hero.headline:
UI/UX Designer
& Design Engineer
hero.subheadline: Graphic designer specialising in UX/UI and development. I take projects from concept to implementation combining Figma, UX research and code, with a sharp eye for detail and a commitment to excellence.

projects.section_subtitle: Selected work — design, branding and user experience.

about.title: About
about.body: I'm a graphic designer by training, specialising in audiovisual media, UX/UI and development. I work with Figma, UX research, branding, Adobe Suite and AI tools to take a project from concept to production. I'm passionate about projects in education, languages, music and culture. I'm responsible, detail-oriented and committed to excellence in every project I take on. I work primarily remotely and collaborate well both independently and within teams. Native Spanish, C2 French, B2 English — currently learning German and Portuguese.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.success_body: Thanks for reaching out. I'll reply within 48 hours.
contact.error_body: Something went wrong. Please try again or email me directly.

footer.made_with: Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS

meta.home_title: Sareli Santiago García — UI/UX Designer & Design Engineer
meta.home_description: Portfolio of Sareli Santiago García, UI/UX Designer and Design Engineer specialising in branding, user experience and projects in education, languages and culture.
